courseleaf.title: Earth & Planetary Sciences, Master of Science
courseleaf.informationtext:
Master of Science

The Earth & Planetary Sciences department offers programs of study and research leading to M.S. and Ph.D. degrees in Earth & Planetary Sciences. For more information, see Earth & Planetary Sciences Graduate Program.

Degree Requirements & Program Coordinator

See Earth & Planetary Sciences.
courseleaf.quickviewtext: Earth and planetary sciences provides a dynamic interdisciplinary environment for studies of the Earth and planets, as well as the history of life on Earth, and applied and environmental geosciences. Students graduate with the skills necessary for professional research and teaching of earth structure and evolution. The campus is well situated to provide access to field areas exhibiting diverse geologic and tectonic phenomena, to the Bodega Marine Laboratory, and to other UC research stations.
